working_on: Fix Issue #150 — validate-history.jsonl per-clone HISTORY_FILE resolution defeats ADR 0063 regression check; pin to canonical main-repo location.
declared_scope: Land the fix for Issue #150 (S-0204 audit Finding B). Replace `HISTORY_FILE = REPO_ROOT / ...` in `engine/tools/validate.py` with a `_resolve_canonical_history_path()` helper that resolves to the main-repo's `engine/tools/validate-history.jsonl` via `git rev-parse --git-common-dir` (falls back to per-clone path on subprocess failure). Author `engine/tests/test_validate_history_resolution.py` (3 tests). Verify end-to-end (worktree run, boot-probe run, synthetic regression-fire, pytest, pre-commit hook integration). Author ADR 0063 Consequences amendment + `tools-validate-interpretation.md` annotation. Close Issue #150. Issue #115 deferred per user pick (trigger-gated; cluster ADR is the design surface). phase: NA-engine-apparatus
outcome_summary: Delivered. `_resolve_canonical_history_path()` pinned HISTORY_FILE to canonical main-repo location via `git rev-parse --git-common-dir`; 3 pytest cases against tmp git fixtures (3/3 pass). ADR 0063 Consequences amended; `tools-validate-interpretation.md` annotated; Issue #150 closed (commits `fc29e9e` + `460f3f0`). Live first-fire at close `--final-check`: `validator_runtime_phase_regression` fires for the first time ever (median `duration_structural_ms` 909.6ms vs 500ms target / 750ms threshold) — the regression check is now structurally operative AND producing real signal; the underlying structural-phase regression is recommended for S-0206 investigation per the next-session work item. Issue #115 deferred to cluster-ADR landing per user-confirmed pushback (drawer `93d76b20`). 3 drawers paired (decision `359cab0b`, lesson `0c8863ca`, pushback `93d76b20`); diary `b7e7f288`. Tests file lives at `engine/tools/test_validate_history_resolution.py`.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — the fix landed end-to-end (code + tests + ADR + ops-doc + Issue close). The only scope departure was the user-confirmed deferral of Issue #115 in plan mode (user picked Option 1 'Defer #115; fix #150 only' after the AI surfaced the trigger-gate problem via AskUserQuestion). Plan's 6 phases all executed: investigation, implementation, tests, verification, documentation, drawer pairing.
